requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Disturbance for Lighting Equipment (SNI adopting CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备的 EMC / 无线电骚扰（采纳 CISPR 15 的 SNI）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備的 EMC / 無線電騷擾（採納 CISPR 15 的 SNI）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility for lighting equipment in Indonesia is addressed through the applicable SNI that adopts CISPR 15 (limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), covering conducted emissions on mains terminals (150 kHz to 30 MHz) and radiated disturbance. Where EMC requirements fall within the scope of the mandatory SNI certification for a lighting product, conformity is demonstrated through type testing at an LSPro-recognised laboratory as part of the SPPT-SNI process. The product must be tested for operation on the Indonesian 230 V, 50 Hz supply. EMC for purely radio/telecom functions of smart lighting is handled additionally under SDPPI (see ledidn-emc-02).
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚照明设备的电磁兼容性通过采纳 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）的适用 SNI 处理，涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及辐射骚扰。当某照明产品的 EMC 要求属强制性 SNI 认证范围时，须在 SPPT-SNI 流程中通过在 LSPro 认可实验室进行的型式试验证明符合性。产品须按印度尼西亚 230 V、50 Hz 电源进行检测。智能照明纯无线电/电信功能的 EMC 还须另行依据 SDPPI 处理（见 ledidn-emc-02）。
summary.zht: 印度尼西亞照明設備的電磁兼容性通過採納 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）的適用 SNI 處理，涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz 至 30 MHz）及輻射騷擾。當某照明產品的 EMC 要求屬強制性 SNI 認證範圍時，須在 SPPT-SNI 流程中通過在 LSPro 認可實驗室進行的型式試驗證明符合性。產品須按印度尼西亞 230 V、50 Hz 電源進行檢測。智能照明純無線電/電信功能的 EMC 還須另行依據 SDPPI 處理（見 ledidn-emc-02）。

standards_or_laws: Applicable SNI adopting CISPR 15 — radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment
SPPT-SNI certification process — type testing at an LSPro-recognised laboratory

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification, which covers both safety and EMC for relevant product categories. Testing is conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not directly accepted by the Indonesian SNI / LSPro scheme.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测须在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被印度尼西亚 SNI / LSPro 制度直接接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測須在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被印度尼西亞 SNI / LSPro 制度直接接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both the Indonesian SNI and China's GB 17743 derive from CISPR 15, so the underlying emission limits are largely harmonized. The key gaps are procedural: (1) Indonesia requires conformity to be demonstrated within the mandatory SNI / SPPT-SNI process held by an accredited LSPro, not via self-declaration; (2) Chinese GB 17743 / CCC test reports are generally not directly accepted, so EMC re-testing at an Indonesian-recognised laboratory is typically required; (3) the product must be tested at 230 V, 50 Hz rather than China's 220 V; (4) where the luminaire integrates wireless functionality, SDPPI radio approval applies in addition (see ledidn-emc-02). Confirm the exact SNI reference and whether EMC is within the mandatory scope for the specific lighting product with the LSPro.
gap.zh: 印度尼西亚 SNI 与中国 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，故底层发射限值基本协调。主要差距属程序性：（1）印度尼西亚要求在由经认可 LSPro 持有的强制性 SNI / SPPT-SNI 流程中证明符合性，而非自我声明；（2）中国 GB 17743 / CCC 检测报告通常不被直接接受，因此一般须在印度尼西亚认可实验室重新进行 EMC 检测；（3）产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 而非中国 220 V 进行检测；（4）当灯具集成无线功能时，还须另行办理 SDPPI 无线电核准（见 ledidn-emc-02）。请向 LSPro 核实确切 SNI 引用以及该具体照明产品的 EMC 是否属强制范围。
gap.zht: 印度尼西亞 SNI 與中國 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，故底層發射限值基本協調。主要差距屬程序性：（1）印度尼西亞要求在由經認可 LSPro 持有的強制性 SNI / SPPT-SNI 流程中證明符合性，而非自我聲明；（2）中國 GB 17743 / CCC 檢測報告通常不被直接接受，因此一般須在印度尼西亞認可實驗室重新進行 EMC 檢測；（3）產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 而非中國 220 V 進行檢測；（4）當燈具集成無線功能時，還須另行辦理 SDPPI 無線電核准（見 ledidn-emc-02）。請向 LSPro 核實確切 SNI 引用以及該具體照明產品的 EMC 是否屬強制範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — EMC / radio disturbance conformity to the applicable SNI (CISPR 15-based) demonstrated through type testing within the SPPT-SNI process at an LSPro-recognised laboratory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: Badan Standardisasi Nasional (BSN) — National Standardisation Agency of Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC / radio-disturbance conformity for lighting in Indonesia is demonstrated through the applicable CISPR 15-based SNI within the mandatory SPPT-SNI process at an LSPro-recognised laboratory. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but Chinese CCC/GB reports are generally not directly accepted and re-testing at 230 V, 50 Hz is typically required. Smart luminaires with wireless functions additionally require SDPPI approval. Confirm scope and the exact SNI reference with the LSPro.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 印度尼西亚照明的 EMC / 无线电骚扰符合性，通过适用的基于 CISPR 15 的 SNI 在 LSPro 认可实验室的强制性 SPPT-SNI 流程中证明。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC/GB 报告通常不被直接接受，一般须按 230 V、50 Hz 重新检测。集成无线功能的智能灯具还须办理 SDPPI 核准。请向 LSPro 核实适用范围及确切 SNI 引用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 印度尼西亞照明的 EMC / 無線電騷擾符合性，通過適用的基於 CISPR 15 的 SNI 在 LSPro 認可實驗室的強制性 SPPT-SNI 流程中證明。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC/GB 報告通常不被直接接受，一般須按 230 V、50 Hz 重新檢測。集成無線功能的智能燈具還須辦理 SDPPI 核准。請向 LSPro 核實適用範圍及確切 SNI 引用。

requirement_topic.en: SDPPI Radio/Telecom Type Approval for Smart (Wireless) Lighting
requirement_topic.zh: 智能（无线）照明的 SDPPI 无线电/电信型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: 智能（無線）照明的 SDPPI 無線電/電信型號核准

summary.en: Smart LED lighting that incorporates radio functionality (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other RF) requires type approval (sertifikat / certificate) from SDPPI (Direktorat Jenderal Sumber Daya dan Perangkat Pos dan Informatika), the directorate general for resources and equipment of post and informatics under the Ministry of Communication and Digital. The device must be tested against the applicable Indonesian telecommunication equipment standards (which adopt relevant ETSI/IEC RF and SAR-type methods) at an SDPPI-recognised test laboratory, and certification must be obtained through a local applicant before the product can be imported, distributed, sold, or operated in Indonesia. The use of radio frequencies must comply with the Indonesian frequency allocation table. This is in addition to mandatory SNI safety certification and any ESDM energy labelling.
summary.zh: 集成无线电功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或其他射频）的智能 LED 照明，须取得 SDPPI（邮政与信息技术资源及设备总局，隶属通信与数字部）的型号核准（sertifikat / 证书）。设备须在 SDPPI 认可的检测实验室依据适用的印度尼西亚电信设备标准（采纳相关 ETSI/IEC 射频及 SAR 类方法）进行检测，并须通过本地申请人取得认证，方可在印度尼西亚进口、分销、销售或使用。无线电频率的使用须符合印度尼西亚频率分配表。此项为强制性 SNI 安全认证及任何 ESDM 能效标签之外的额外要求。
summary.zht: 集成無線電功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或其他射頻）的智能 LED 照明，須取得 SDPPI（郵政與信息技術資源及設備總局，隸屬通信與數字部）的型號核准（sertifikat / 證書）。設備須在 SDPPI 認可的檢測實驗室依據適用的印度尼西亞電信設備標準（採納相關 ETSI/IEC 射頻及 SAR 類方法）進行檢測，並須通過本地申請人取得認證，方可在印度尼西亞進口、分銷、銷售或使用。無線電頻率的使用須符合印度尼西亞頻率分配表。此項為強制性 SNI 安全認證及任何 ESDM 能效標籤之外的額外要求。

standards_or_laws: SDPPI (Ditjen SDPPI) telecommunication equipment type approval — Ministry of Communication and Digital, Republic of Indonesia
Indonesian telecommunication equipment technical standards for RF devices (adopting relevant ETSI/IEC RF methods)

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires (e.g., smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module, in addition to CCC where applicable and CTA / network access licensing for certain telecom equipment. SRRC type approval verifies RF parameters (frequency, transmit power, occupied bandwidth, spurious emissions) against Chinese radio regulations. SRRC approval is China-specific and is not recognised by Indonesia's SDPPI; separate SDPPI certification through a local applicant is required.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具（如具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED）须为无线电模块取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，并在适用时配合 CCC，以及对部分电信设备的 CTA / 进网许可。SRRC 型号核准依据中国无线电法规核验射频参数（频率、发射功率、占用带宽、杂散发射）。SRRC 核准为中国特有，不被印度尼西亚 SDPPI 承认；须通过本地申请人单独取得 SDPPI 认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具（如具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED）須為無線電模塊取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，並在適用時配合 CCC，以及對部分電信設備的 CTA / 進網許可。SRRC 型號核准依據中國無線電法規核驗射頻參數（頻率、發射功率、佔用帶寬、雜散發射）。SRRC 核准為中國特有，不被印度尼西亞 SDPPI 承認；須通過本地申請人單獨取得 SDPPI 認證。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled equipment in China (State Radio Regulation Commission)
CTA / network access licence — required for certain telecom equipment in China where applicable

gap.en: Both markets require national radio type approval for wireless smart lighting, but the schemes are independent with no mutual recognition. A Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy Indonesia's SDPPI requirement. Key Indonesia-specific points: (1) SDPPI certification must be applied for through a locally registered applicant/importer, not directly by a foreign manufacturer; (2) testing must be at an SDPPI-recognised laboratory against Indonesian standards and the local frequency allocation; (3) SDPPI approval is a separate obligation from mandatory SNI safety certification — a smart luminaire needs both SNI and SDPPI; (4) the SDPPI certificate/label requirements must be met before import and sale. Confirm the exact applicant eligibility, test scope, and current SDPPI procedure for the specific RF technology used.
gap.zh: 两个市场均要求无线智能照明取得国家无线电型号核准，但制度各自独立、互不承认。中国 SRRC 核准不能满足印度尼西亚 SDPPI 要求。主要印度尼西亚特有要点：（1）SDPPI 认证须通过本地注册的申请人/进口商申请，外国制造商不可直接申请；（2）检测须在 SDPPI 认可实验室依据印度尼西亚标准及本地频率分配进行；（3）SDPPI 核准是与强制性 SNI 安全认证相互独立的义务——智能灯具须同时具备 SNI 与 SDPPI；（4）SDPPI 证书/标签要求须在进口和销售前满足。请就所用具体射频技术核实确切的申请人资格、检测范围及现行 SDPPI 流程。
gap.zht: 兩個市場均要求無線智能照明取得國家無線電型號核准，但制度各自獨立、互不承認。中國 SRRC 核准不能滿足印度尼西亞 SDPPI 要求。主要印度尼西亞特有要點：（1）SDPPI 認證須通過本地注冊的申請人/進口商申請，外國製造商不可直接申請；（2）檢測須在 SDPPI 認可實驗室依據印度尼西亞標準及本地頻率分配進行；（3）SDPPI 核准是與強制性 SNI 安全認證相互獨立的義務——智能燈具須同時具備 SNI 與 SDPPI；（4）SDPPI 證書/標籤要求須在進口和銷售前滿足。請就所用具體射頻技術核實確切的申請人資格、檢測範圍及現行 SDPPI 流程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless products — SDPPI type approval required before import, sale, or operation of RF-enabled smart lighting in Indonesia; applied for through a local applicant; separate from SNI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless products — SRRC type approval (plus CTA/network access where applicable) required for wireless-enabled equipment in China

source.publisher: Direktorat Jenderal SDPPI — Ministry of Communication and Digital, Republic of Indonesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart LED lighting with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth/Zigbee requires SDPPI radio/telecom type approval in Indonesia, applied for through a local applicant and tested at an SDPPI-recognised laboratory — separate from and additional to mandatory SNI certification. A Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised. Confirm applicant eligibility, the RF test scope, and the current SDPPI procedure for the specific wireless technology before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙/Zigbee 的智能 LED 照明在印度尼西亚须取得 SDPPI 无线电/电信型号核准，通过本地申请人申请并在 SDPPI 认可实验室检测——独立于强制性 SNI 认证且为额外要求。中国 SRRC 核准不被承认。进口前请就所用具体无线技术核实申请人资格、射频检测范围及现行 SDPPI 流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙/Zigbee 的智能 LED 照明在印度尼西亞須取得 SDPPI 無線電/電信型號核准，通過本地申請人申請並在 SDPPI 認可實驗室檢測——獨立於強制性 SNI 認證且為額外要求。中國 SRRC 核准不被承認。進口前請就所用具體無線技術核實申請人資格、射頻檢測範圍及現行 SDPPI 流程。
